assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with rows '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' followed by all five fields: '- Project key: TC', '- Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', '- Feature issue type ID: 10142', '- Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', '- GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-20: '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Also includes a concrete example: 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' appears after '## Code Intelligence' (line 18) and before '## Bug Configuration' (line 35), correctly nested under Code Intelligence

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-14: '## Step 2 — Discover Serena Instances' with 'Discovery method: Scanned available MCP tools for the naming pattern `mcp__<instance-name>__<tool>`' and 'Discovered instances: 1. **serena_backend** — identified from tools: mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol...' and '2. **serena_ui** — identified from tools: mcp__serena_ui__find_symbol...'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 3: 'All sections were newly created. The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section, so the entire configuration block was added.' Lines 18-58 list each section as '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)', '## Jira Configuration (new)', '## Code Intelligence (new)', '## Bug Configuration (new)'. Lines 8-12 show preserved non-config content: 'Original `# my-project` heading', '`## Documentation` section', '`## Getting Started` section'.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exact column names match the expected structure

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-39: '## Bug Configuration' followed by '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 56-58: '## Step 10 — Security Configuration' states 'User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project' and 'Section not created'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after '## Hierarchy Configuration' at line 43.
